Hosted Nnual TSMC Day Event with Over 200 Student Attendees

Question

Activity Description (Short)

o Executed 5 new joint development projects between ASU faculty and TSMC technical owners ($600k) o Hosted annual TSMC Day event with over 200 student attendees, showcasing research and opportunities at TSMC o Developed TSMC technician training intensive program in partnership with Shan Strategie...
